allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("public\\models\\tellrx5.glb"\); $jsonLen = [BitConverter]::ToUInt32\($bytes, 12\); $json = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes, 20, $jsonLen\); $obj = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; "SCENES:"; $obj.scenes | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; "NODES:"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $obj.nodes.Count; $i++\) { $n = $obj.nodes[$i]; $childList = if \($n.children\) { $n.children -join "," } else { "-" }; "[{0}] {1} children=\({2}\)" -f $i, $n.name, $childList })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("public\\models\\tellrx5.glb"\); $jsonLen = [BitConverter]::ToUInt32\($bytes, 12\); $json = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes, 20, $jsonLen\); $obj = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; "Scene name:"; $obj.scenes[0].name; "Node children index 0 \(cockpit\):"; $obj.nodes[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3; "Node with mesh + children?"; $obj.nodes | Where-Object { $_.children } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.name\) -> $\($_.children -join ','\)" })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("public\\models\\tellrx5.glb"\); $jsonLen = [BitConverter]::ToUInt32\($bytes, 12\); $json = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes, 20, $jsonLen\); $obj = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; "Total nodes: $\($obj.nodes.Count\)"; "Total meshes: $\($obj.meshes.Count\)"; ""; "All nodes \(full dump\):"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $obj.nodes.Count; $i++\) { $n = $obj.nodes[$i]; $hasMesh = if \($null -ne $n.mesh\) { "mesh=$\($n.mesh\)" } else { "no-mesh" }; $kids = if \($n.children\) { "kids=[$\($n.children -join ','\)]" } else { "no-kids" }; "[$i] '$\($n.name\)' $hasMesh $kids" }; ""; "Meshes:"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $obj.meshes.Count; $i++\) { "[$i] '$\($obj.meshes[$i].name\)' prims=$\($obj.meshes[$i].primitives.Count\)" })
